summary.macroSummary: Bitcoin headlines show mixed sentiment with the asset consolidating in the $78-83K range amid low Google search interest and analyst warnings of potential downside. Several major developments include Strategic Bitcoin Reserve progress, MicroStrategy teasing additional purchases, and a large $50M Ethereum short position impacting crypto markets.
summary.regimePressureReason: Headlines show crypto-specific consolidation and mixed sentiment rather than clear macro regime signals, with risk asset behavior appearing more idiosyncratic than regime-driven.

keySignals.signal: Bitcoin search interest sinking below bear market levels suggests retail capitulation despite institutional activity
Bitcoin holding $78-83K range with consolidation structure forming around $80K indicates sideways digestion rather than directional breakout
Large $50M Ethereum short position creating market pressure while ETH shows triangle breakdown technically
MicroStrategy planning additional Bitcoin purchases despite macro uncertainty shows continued institutional accumulation
Italy's largest bank doubling crypto holdings to $235M reflects continued institutional adoption trend

actionItems: Monitor BMNR/ETH correlation if crypto consolidation extends - may create better entry points for cash-secured puts
Watch for any crypto correlation breakdown with traditional risk assets that might signal broader regime shifts
